article.title: Uber expectations for staff
article.content:
I recently interviewed at Uber India and expecting offer soon (L5B). I had couple of questions to help me join:

1. How much TC can I expect?
2. What are some good teams with good work especially related to core AI (not just building MCP servers/agent) or Big Data engine (Apache Pinot) optimizations etc? 
3. Also, I don't want crazy expectations of work hours eg > 8 hours/day. Is it common?

Current TC: 1.6 Cr (Google)

#India #Uber #l5b #staff

post.content: You're just crazyy man. Hoping to be you some day
Expect lot of micromanagement, stack ranking and crazy hours.. how many yoe do you have?

Hey Anon, Firstly congrats on the rounds. 

I myself am going to start the process next week. Can you help me with these? 
- what to expect in DSA/ LLD interviews?
- What was expected in HLD round? Like what was the question, till what level of deep dive did you do? For ex., for payments team did they expect you to have in-depth domain knowledge? 
- Did you have 2 HLDs? or just 1? 

----
Just to answer your question, you can expect 1.8 to 2.1 Cr/year. Teams, I can't comment, but they definitely expect you to work ~50-55 hrs per week.

I know L5B managers have gotten 1.8-2.2 Cr, should be same for ICs as well, but as the other guy said - Bad WLB, long working hours, it all comes down to manager and team, but there are hard pip quotas now, like Amazon. So expected the same hunger games (like credit stealing) as Amazon.

I am currently working at Uber.
Would not recommend to join. 
They might offer at max 1.8 to 2 cr for this role
For L5B, the expectations are way high. Minimum 12 to 14 hours per day.
And the worst part is you can still be laid off any time due to stack ranking which is very common in Uber.
